 Service:              kms.amazonaws.com                                                                                                           │  IAM Roles
 ACTION                                                                                                                                            │  IAM Users
 Event:                kms:RotateKey                                                                                                               │  EC2 Instances
 Category:             Management / AwsServiceEvent                                                                                                │  S3 Buckets
 TARGET                                                                                                                                            │  Lambda Functions
 Key:                  2f7e9a5b-8c1d-4e3f-9a0b-1c2d3e4f5a6b                                                                                        │  RDS Instances
 CONTEXT                                                                                                                                           │  KMS Keys
 Region:               us-east-1                                                                                                                   │  Secrets
 Source IP:            AWS Internal                                                                                                                │  VPC Endpoints
 Recipient:            444444444444 (cross-account)                                                                                                │  Security Groups
 Time:                 2026-04-07T02:00:07Z                                                                                                        │  DynamoDB Tables
 REQUEST                                                                                                                                           │  CloudFormation Stacks
 backingKey:           true                                                                                                                        │  CT events by AccessKeyId
 rotationType:         AUTOMATIC                                                                                                                   │  CT events by Username
